title: medicago littoralis subsp. braunii
intro: Medicago littoralis subsp. braunii, also known as Braun's medick or Braun's lucerne, is a subspecies of the annual legume Medicago littoralis, commonly found in coastal areas of the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Medicago littoralis subsp. braunii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or inflorescence, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
